titleStmt.title: SII 40.5: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 5. (A.R. No. B. 366 of 1929.) Tiruppalaivanam, Ponneri Taluk Chingleput District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: On the pedestal of the metallic image of Chandraśēkhara in the Tirruppālēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1681, Pramādi, Vaiśākha śu. 7, corresponding to 1759 A.D., May 3, Thursday.

Records the gift of the images of Chandraśēkhara and his consort in the Pāliśvara temple by Raghunāyakularāju, son of Kumāra-Venkaṭrāju and grandson of Veṅkaṭrāju of Kottūru. The donor is endowed with a number of titles such as Dharaṇī-varāha, Kaṭāri-sāḷuva and Kaḷyāṇapuravarādhīśvara and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1681 Agunēṭi pramādi saṁvatsara vaiśākha śuddha 7 lu śrī
Akhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāyakulaina pāliśvarasvāmi saṁnnidhini caṁdraśēkharasvāmini dēvini śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara dharaṇīvarāhamēdinī
mīsaragaṁḍa kaṭārisāḷva budarāditya babbarabāhu cāṇūramallapaṁcca ghaṁṭānināda kalyāṇapuravarādhīśvara kottūri
veṁkaṭrāju vāri pautṛlaina kumāra veṁkaṭrājuvāri putṛlaina raghunāyakula rājuvāru nirmiṁccina dharmaṁ śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
